name: stillmirror-review
description: Reflective review for agentic work in Claude Desktop: surface where agent work was allocated, see what needs your review, and record your own alignment attestations. Evidence, never a verdict.

tools.name: review_due
tools.description: What needs the user's review: unreviewed allocations, new goal events, agent threads since the last human-attested review.

tools.name: review
tools.description: Return the project's Alignment Review (coverage, review debt, goal provenance, triage, allocation evidence). Evidence, not a verdict.

tools.name: record_alignment
tools.description: Record the user's own alignment attestation — never fabricated by the assistant; names the accountable human.
